headline: Nasdaq rally set to continue, PayPal bid reported, ASML ups outlook

Nasdaq futures were up 0.5% ahead of the opening...

headline: Content Intelligence Market to Reach $39.88 Billion by 2035 as Generative AI Transforms Enterprise Content Operations | Research by SNS Insider

headline: ADBE, CRM, NOW, MSFT: Software Stocks Fall After IBM Warns Clients Shifting Spending To Servers, Cybersecurity
summary: IBM lost nearly a quarter of its market value on Tuesday after the stock suffered its steepest single-day decline since the company went public nearly 60 years ago.
